controls.name: Use OIDC federation for GitHub Actions
controls.rationale: Eliminates long-lived IAM access keys in CI

controls.name: Restrict OIDC trust to specific repo and branch
Alert on IAM key creation within 15 min of workflow run
controls.rationale: Detects attacker creating persistent keys after OIDC pivot

controls.name: Block Describe*/List* API calls from unexpected OIDC sessions
controls.rationale: Detects cloud discovery storm following CI compromise
